title: [BUG] XYZ
author: sbardijs
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

I am trying to access an xlxs file.
I have verified and the file is NOT corrupt.
When I load the file with the following script I get an error.

```js
const workbook = new Excel.Workbook();
await workbook.xlsx.readFile(this.filePath, { skipStyles: true });
```


```sh
node_modules/exceljs/lib/xlsx/xform/sheet/col-xform.js:81
      model.style = options.styles.getStyleModel(model.styleId);
                                   ^

TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'getStyleModel')
    at ColXform.reconcile (/Users/manueltardivo/Sviluppo/soource/compass/node_modules/exceljs/lib/xlsx/xform/sheet/col-xform.js:81:36)
    at /Users/manueltardivo/Sviluppo/soource/compass/node_modules/exceljs/lib/xlsx/xform/list-xform.js:89:20
    at Array.forEach (<anonymous>)
    at ListXform.reconcile (/Users/manueltardivo/Sviluppo/soource/compass/node_modules/exceljs/lib/xlsx/xform/list-xform.js:88:13)
    at WorkSheetXform.reconcile (/Users/manueltardivo/Sviluppo/soource/compass/node_modules/exceljs/lib/xlsx/xform/sheet/worksheet-xform.js:483:19)
    at /Users/manueltardivo/Sviluppo/soource/compass/node_modules/exceljs/lib/xlsx/xlsx.js:132:22
    at Array.forEach (<anonymous>)
    at XLSX.reconcile (/Users/manueltardivo/Sviluppo/soource/compass/node_modules/exceljs/lib/xlsx/xlsx.js:130:22)
    at XLSX.load (/Users/manueltardivo/Sviluppo/soource/compass/node_modules/exceljs/lib/xlsx/xlsx.js:411:10)
    at async XLSX.readFile (/Users/manueltardivo/Sviluppo/soource/compass/node_modules/exceljs/lib/xlsx/xlsx.js:55:24)
    at async CompassAidaJob.getData (file:///Users/manueltardivo/Sviluppo/soource/compass/src/jobs/CompassAidaJob.js:12:5)
```

Lib version: 4.4.0
